candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus shows high conviction (>90%) but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, treat the signal as untested rather than strong — conviction without historical confirmation is a size-down condition, not a trade trigger.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: Conviction measures current indicator agreement; green_matches/hist_hr measure whether that exact configuration has ever profited historically. AUDNZD shows 92% conviction SHORT but zero historical matches — this is a novel indicator alignment the library has never seen resolve. Institutional flow that produces durable moves leaves repeated footprints; a config with no historical analog is more likely a transient crowding artifact than a persistent edge, and sizing it as high-conviction imports variance without expected return.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction > 0.85 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier = 0.5  # untested-config penalty until >=1 historical match exists
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Reduces variance drag on Sharpe by ~+0.02-0.04 by preventing full-size entries on statistically unvalidated indicator configs; protects win rate against novel-config false positives.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: AUDNZD: 2/30 bull | 13/30 bear | conv=92% | green_matches=0 | hist_hr=0%. USDJPY dir=LONG conv=50% also green_matches=0/hist_hr=0%. Every pair currently shows green_matches=0 — the consensus engine is producing conviction numbers with no historical grounding, and last 7 days had 0 trades so none of these signals have been acted on or validated.

retirement_flag.reason: L8 tightens the USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate to 13 for a bull market; current VIX is 15.84-16.9 and regime is UNKNOWN/BREADTH rather than confirmed bull — the gate premise (bull market + rising VIX) may no longer hold, so the veto could be firing under conditions it wasn't validated for. Worth re-checking whether the 13 threshold is still calibrated to the current regime.

reflection.system_health_note: System is in a clean observation state — 0 trades in 7 days, regime UNKNOWN, TV confirmation absent (internal-only sizing at 75%), so the priority is validating that the consensus engine's zero-green-match signals resolve before committing capital into the CPI window (2 days out).
